search_queries_used: site:nice.org.uk NG115 COPD follow-up Table 6 recommendations
candidate_sources_rejected: 2016 UAE COPD copy with unclear current status
rejection_reasons: Patient pages are not clinician guidance.
The older UAE copy had uncertain current or superseded status.
Medicine names and doses were not mapped.
population_applicability: Partial: exact for people over 16 years with COPD; the legacy workflow has no age filter.
setting_applicability: Direct for stable COPD follow-up and documentation of exacerbation features, not acute treatment.
UAE_applicability: International NICE guidance requires UAE clinician review and local rehabilitation, vaccination, oxygen, referral, and prescribing pathways.
recency_verification: The current official NG115 recommendations were opened on 2026-07-13.
superseded_check: NG115 remains the current official NICE COPD guideline; the older UAE copy was not selected.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped COPD follow-up identity, breathlessness, exercise, exacerbation, inhaler, smoking, function, oxygen, oedema, spirometry, oxygen assessment, clinician-decided plan, smoking, rehabilitation, vaccination, referral, and arranged-follow-up fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports at least annual review of smoking, breathlessness, exercise tolerance, exacerbations, pulmonary rehabilitation, complications, medicine effects, inhaler technique, referral need, FEV1 and FVC, BMI, MRC dyspnoea, oxygen saturation, cor pulmonale, nutrition, mood, and social needs.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports mapped cough, sputum, worsening breathlessness, and sputum-colour review as documented features without asserting an exacerbation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician review of worsening breathlessness, cough, sputum production, and sputum colour change as exacerbation features without asserting an exacerbation diagnosis.

unresolved_source_gaps: People aged 16 years or younger are outside the exact source.

Assessed-negative fields, acute red flags, chest auscultation, respiratory rate, accessory muscles, percussion, previous records, generic clinician plans, fixed follow-up, PRN wording, and the lowercase typo in the legacy history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis confirmation, treatment choice, medicine dosing, oxygen interpretation, acute disposition, and qualified clinician review remain clinician responsibilities.

legacy_item_support_mappings.direct_relationship: The exact NICE follow-up section supports these adult COPD review terms, breathlessness, exacerbation, exercise, inhaler, smoking, function, oxygen, oedema, spirometry, oxygen assessment, clinician-decided plan, smoking, rehabilitation, vaccination, referral, and arranged-follow-up fields.
